Site Hazard Spotter

Pick a job site photo. Get a professional safety brief in 10 seconds.

Curated construction photos — no upload required. Select a site, then analyze.

Pull a random real construction image from our verified stock library.

Multi-agent pipeline designs a hazardous scenario, generates a photorealistic site image, then inspects it.

Uses Claude for scenario design + Pollinations for image synthesis.

—
  • Reading site conditions...
  • Checking fall protection...
  • Reviewing PPE compliance...
  • Identifying equipment hazards...
  • Generating safety brief...
—

This report is an AI-assisted visual analysis tool and does not constitute a formal OSHA inspection or legal compliance certification. Always verify findings with a qualified safety professional before work begins.
